title: Relevant Information on ('Umar' s Night Visits) / x09 Umar's Being Called Commander of the Faithful
description: Relevant Information on ('Umar' s Night Visits) / x09 Umar's Being Called Commander of the Faithful. Recorded under the year 22 AH (643–644 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 14.
